'''safudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdellium|bdellium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdellium|bdellium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| safudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæfidith|sæfidith]] || [[word:sæfidij|sæfidij]] || [[word:sæfidish|sæfidish]] || [[word:sæfidi|sæfidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:safufuduth|safufuduth]] || [[word:safufuduj|safufuduj]] || [[word:safufudush|safufudush]] || [[word:safufudu|safufudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:safuduth|safuduth]] || [[word:safuduj|safuduj]] || [[word:safudush|safudush]] || [[word:safudu|safudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:safufduth|safufduth]] || [[word:safufduj|safufduj]] || [[word:safufdush|safufdush]] || [[word:safufduf|safufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:safuduthu|safuduthu]] || [[word:safuduju|safuduju]] || [[word:safudushu|safudushu]] || [[word:safuduku|safuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:safuduth|safuduth]] || [[word:safuduj|safuduj]] || [[word:safudush|safudush]] || [[word:safudu|safudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:safuduthul|safuduthul]] || [[word:safudujul|safudujul]] || [[word:safudushul|safudushul]] || [[word:safudukul|safudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:safuduthuthu|safuduthuthu]] || [[word:safudujuju|safudujuju]] || [[word:safudushushu|safudushushu]] || [[word:safuduku|safuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:safuduthun|safuduthun]] || [[word:safudujun|safudujun]] || [[word:safudushun|safudushun]] || [[word:safudukun|safudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:safuduthuoro|safuduthuoro]] || [[word:safudujuoro|safudujuoro]] || [[word:safudushuoro|safudushuoro]] || [[word:safudukuoro|safudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
